title: tters: Foundational to ecology, ethics, systems design. — Recursive Symbol: Web,
content:
tters: Foundational to ecology, ethics, systems design. — Recursive Symbol: Web, network, mycelium.[L7] L4W 0F C0MP3NS4T10N / C0N5ERV4T10NFor every gain, something is lost or transformed; energy is not destroyed, only changed. — Why it matters: Undergirds economics, sacrifice, ritual, physics. — Recursive Symbol: Scales, balance, crucible.II. UNIVERSAL ARCHETYPES (TRUTHS IN SYMBOLIC FORM)
These are not “laws,” but rather eternal patterns recognized across civilizations, stories, and metaphysical systems.
• The Trickster: Subverts structure to create new order (chaotic force of change).
• The Hero: Seeks transformation and returns bearing knowledge.
• The Shadow: Repressed or mirrored self, necessary for wholeness.
• The Flood / Fire / Storm: Cleansing chaos before rebirth.
• The Axis Mundi / Tree / Mountain: Bridge between realms.
• The Sacred Number: 3 (movement), 4 (structure), 7 (mystery), 12 (cycle).
• The Spiral: Time, memory, DNA, galaxies, development.
• The Mirror: Consciousness reflecting itself.
III. MODERN REFORMULATIONS
• Information = Energy = Reality (physics, digital metaphysics, simulation theory).
context: From document: 🧵 Meta-Laws of Reality — chunk 2 (chunk 2/79)
